  1021: function aiwB6R95R3D1NormalizeGeneratedArtifact(item, index) {
  1022:   const seq = String(index + 1).padStart(2, "0");
  1023:   const kind = aiwB6R95R3R3OneLine(item?.artifact_kind_code || item?.kind || "document", "document");
  1024:   const title = aiwB6R95R3R3OneLine(item?.title || item?.artifact_title_ja || `成果物${seq}`, `成果物${seq}`);
  1025:   const body = aiwB6R95R3R3Text(item?.body_markdown || item?.body_text || item?.content || "");
  1026:   const suggestedName = item?.file_name || `${seq}_${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(title, `artifact_${seq}`)}.md`;
  1027:   const fileName = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}.md`).endsWith(".md")
  1028:     ? aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}.md`)
  1029:     : `${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}`)}.md`;
  1030:   return {
  1031:     artifact_no: index + 1,
  1032:     artifact_kind_code: kind,
  1033:     title,
  1034:     file_name: fileName,
  1035:     body_markdown: body,
  1036:     body_format: "markdown"
  1037:   };
  1038: }
  1039: 
  1040: function aiwB6R95R3D1BuildGeneratedArtifacts(deliverable) {
  1041:   const provided = Array.isArray(deliverable?.generatedArtifacts) ? deliverable.generatedArtifacts : [];
  1042:   if (provided.length > 0) {
  1043:     return provided.map(aiwB6R95R3D1NormalizeGeneratedArtifact);
  1044:   }
  1045: 
  1046:   const artifacts = [
  1047:     {
  1048:       kind: "main_deliverable",
  1049:       title: deliverable?.outputTitle || "主成果物",
  1050:       file_name: "01_main_deliverable.md",
  1051:       body_markdown: deliverable?.bodyMarkdown || ""
  1052:     }
  1053:   ];
  1054: 
  1055:   if (aiwB6R95R3R3Text(deliverable?.qualityNotes)) {
  1056:     artifacts.push({
  1057:       kind: "quality_notes",
  1058:       title: "品質メモ",
  1059:       file_name: "90_quality_notes.md",
  1060:       body_markdown: deliverable.qualityNotes
  1061:     });
  1062:   }
  1063: 
  1064:   if (aiwB6R95R3R3Text(deliverable?.unresolvedIssues)) {
  1065:     artifacts.push({
  1066:       kind: "unresolved_issues",
  1067:       title: "未解決事項",
  1068:       file_name: "91_unresolved_issues.md",
  1069:       body_markdown: deliverable.unresolvedIssues
  1070:     });
  1071:   }
  1072: 
  1073:   if (aiwB6R95R3R3Text(deliverable?.nextSteps)) {
  1074:     artifacts.push({
  1075:       kind: "next_steps",
  1076:       title: "次工程",
  1077:       file_name: "92_next_steps.md",
  1078:       body_markdown: deliverable.nextSteps
  1079:     });
  1080:   }
  1081: 
  1082:   return artifacts.map(aiwB6R95R3D1NormalizeGeneratedArtifact);
  1083: }

  1092:         c = (c & 1) ? (0xedb88320 ^ (c >>> 1)) : (c >>> 1);
  1093:       }
  1094:       table[i] = c >>> 0;
  1095:     }
  1096:     aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table = table;
  1097:   }
  1098:   let crc = 0xffffffff;
  1099:   for (const byte of buffer) {
  1100:     crc = table[(crc ^ byte) & 0xff] ^ (crc >>> 8);
  1101:   }
  1102:   return (crc ^ 0xffffffff) >>> 0;
  1103: }

  1105: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipDosDateTime(date) {
  1106:   const year = Math.max(1980, date.getFullYear());
  1107:   const dosTime = (date.getHours() << 11) | (date.getMinutes() << 5) | Math.floor(date.getSeconds() / 2);
  1108:   const dosDate = ((year - 1980) << 9) | ((date.getMonth() + 1) << 5) | date.getDate();
  1109:   return { dosTime, dosDate };
  1110: }

  1112: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipStored(entries) {
  1113:   const localParts = [];
  1114:   const centralParts = [];
  1115:   let offset = 0;
  1116:   const now = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipDosDateTime(new Date());
  1117: 
  1118:   for (const entry of entries) {
  1119:     const nameBuffer = Buffer.from(entry.name, "utf8");
  1120:     const dataBuffer = Buffer.from(String(entry.content ?? ""), "utf8");
  1121:     const crc = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32(dataBuffer);
  1122: 
  1123:     const local = Buffer.alloc(30);
  1124:     local.writeUInt32LE(0x04034b50, 0);
  1125:     local.writeUInt16LE(20, 4);
  1126:     local.writeUInt16LE(0, 6);
  1127:     local.writeUInt16LE(0, 8);
  1128:     local.writeUInt16LE(now.dosTime, 10);
  1129:     local.writeUInt16LE(now.dosDate, 12);
  1130:     local.writeUInt32LE(crc, 14);
  1131:     local.writeUInt32LE(dataBuffer.length, 18);
  1132:     local.writeUInt32LE(dataBuffer.length, 22);
  1133:     local.writeUInt16LE(nameBuffer.length, 26);
  1134:     local.writeUInt16LE(0, 28);
  1135:     localParts.push(local, nameBuffer, dataBuffer);
  1136: 
  1137:     const central = Buffer.alloc(46);
  1138:     central.writeUInt32LE(0x02014b50, 0);
  1139:     central.writeUInt16LE(20, 4);
  1140:     central.writeUInt16LE(20, 6);
  1141:     central.writeUInt16LE(0, 8);
  1142:     central.writeUInt16LE(0, 10);
  1143:     central.writeUInt16LE(now.dosTime, 12);
  1144:     central.writeUInt16LE(now.dosDate, 14);
  1145:     central.writeUInt32LE(crc, 16);
  1146:     central.writeUInt32LE(dataBuffer.length, 20);
  1147:     central.writeUInt32LE(dataBuffer.length, 24);
  1148:     central.writeUInt16LE(nameBuffer.length, 28);
  1149:     central.writeUInt16LE(0, 30);

  1021: function aiwB6R95R3D1NormalizeGeneratedArtifact(item, index) {
  1022:   const seq = String(index + 1).padStart(2, "0");
  1023:   const kind = aiwB6R95R3R3OneLine(item?.artifact_kind_code || item?.kind || "document", "document");

  1027:   const fileName = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}.md`).endsWith(".md")

  1029:     : `${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}`)}.md`;

  1033:     title,
  1034:     file_name: fileName,

  1040: function aiwB6R95R3D1BuildGeneratedArtifacts(deliverable) {
  1041:   const provided = Array.isArray(deliverable?.generatedArtifacts) ? deliverable.generatedArtifacts : [];
  1042:   if (provided.length > 0) {
  1043:     return provided.map(aiwB6R95R3D1NormalizeGeneratedArtifact);
  1044:   }

  1052:     }
  1053:   ];

  1056:     artifacts.push({

  1058:       title: "品質メモ",
  1059:       file_name: "90_quality_notes.md",
  1060:       body_markdown: deliverable.qualityNotes
  1061:     });
  1062:   }

  1067:       title: "未解決事項",
  1068:       file_name: "91_unresolved_issues.md",
  1069:       body_markdown: deliverable.unresolvedIssues
  1070:     });
  1071:   }

  1077:       file_name: "92_next_steps.md",
  1078:       body_markdown: deliverable.nextSteps

  1085: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32(buffer) {
  1086:   let table = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table;
  1087:   if (!table) {
  1088:     table = new Uint32Array(256);
  1089:     for (let i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
  1090:       let c = i;
  1091:       for (let k = 0; k < 8; k++) {
  1092:         c = (c & 1) ? (0xedb88320 ^ (c >>> 1)) : (c >>> 1);
  1093:       }
  1094:       table[i] = c >>> 0;
  1095:     }
  1096:     aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table = table;
  1097:   }
  1098:   let crc = 0xffffffff;
  1099:   for (const byte of buffer) {
  1100:     crc = table[(crc ^ byte) & 0xff] ^ (crc >>> 8);
  1101:   }
  1102:   return (crc ^ 0xffffffff) >>> 0;
  1103: }

  1144:     central.writeUInt16LE(now.dosDate, 14);

  1147:     central.writeUInt32LE(dataBuffer.length, 24);
  1148:     central.writeUInt16LE(nameBuffer.length, 28);

  1150:     central.writeUInt16LE(0, 32);

  1153:     central.writeUInt32LE(0, 38);
  1154:     central.writeUInt32LE(offset, 42);

  1156: 
  1157:     offset += local.length + nameBuffer.length + dataBuffer.length;

   649: function aiwB6R95R3Z24PickFirstText(obj, keys) {
   650:   if (!obj || typeof obj !== "object") return "";
   651:   for (const key of keys) {
   652:     if (typeof obj[key] === "string" && obj[key].trim()) return obj[key].trim();
   653:   }
   654:   return "";
   655: }

   657: function aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(value, maxLen = 5000, depth = 0) {
   658:   if (value == null || depth > 5) return "";
   659:   if (typeof value === "string") return value.slice(0, maxLen);
   660:   if (typeof value !== "object") return String(value).slice(0, maxLen);
   661: 
   662:   const parts = [];
   663:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
   664:     for (const item of value.slice(0, 12)) {
   665:       const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(item, maxLen, depth + 1);
   666:       if (t) parts.push(t);
   667:     }
   668:   } else {
   669:     const preferred = [
   670:       "unit_title_ja",
   671:       "unit_summary_ja",
   672:       "unit_body_ja",
   673:       "title_ja",
   674:       "summary_ja",
   675:       "body_ja",
   676:       "content_ja",
   677:       "description_ja",
   678:       "robot_use_summary_ja",
   679:       "source_caution_ja",
   680:       "misconception_guard_ja",
   681:       "topic_label_ja",
   682:       "brain_data_code",
   683:       "detail_axis_code"
   684:     ];
   685:     for (const key of preferred) {
   686:       if (value[key]) {
   687:         const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(value[key], maxLen, depth + 1);
   688:         if (t) parts.push(t);
   689:       }
   690:     }
   691:     if (!parts.length) {
   692:       for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(value).slice(0, 30)) {
   693:         if (/secret|token|password|key/i.test(k)) continue;
   694:         const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(v, maxLen, depth + 1);
   695:         if (t) parts.push(t);
   696:       }
   697:     }
   698:   }
   699: 
   700:   return parts.join("\n").slice(0, maxLen);
   701: }

   869: function aiwB6R95R3Z24BuildMaterialMarkdown(payload, rows) {
   870:   const title = aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload);
   871:   const modelCode = aiwB6R95R3Z24ModelCode(payload);
   872:   const instruction = aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload);

   878:   blocks.push("AIWorkerOSがCX22073JWのruntime materialを参照し、依頼内容に対応する詳細資料として再構成した成果物です。");
   879:   blocks.push("");
   880:   blocks.push("## 2. 生成主体");
   881:   blocks.push("- generation_owner: AIWorkerOS");
   882:   blocks.push("- model_code: " + modelCode);
   883:   blocks.push("- cx_reference_source: CX22073JW runtime material / selector v2 readable brain material");
   884:   blocks.push("- safety_boundary: internal_only_no_external_execution_no_pg_apply_no_destructive_action");
   885:   blocks.push("");
   886:   blocks.push("## 3. 依頼要旨");
   887:   blocks.push(instruction || "依頼文なし");
   888:   blocks.push("");
   889:   blocks.push("## 4. CX参照素材からの展開本文");
   890: 
   891:   rows.slice(0, 16).forEach((row, index) => {
   892:     const title = aiwB6R95R3Z24MaterialTitle(row, index);
   893:     const body = aiwB6R95R3Z24MaterialBody(row).trim();
   894: 
   895:     blocks.push("");
   896:     blocks.push("### 4." + String(index + 1) + " " + title);
   897:     blocks.push(body ? body.slice(0, 2600) : "本文なし");
   898:   });
   899: 
   900:   blocks.push("");
   901:   blocks.push("## 5. 出典・史料注意");
   902:   blocks.push("CX側materialに source_basis / source_caution / verification_status が含まれる場合は、それを優先して扱います。歴史資料では、一次史料・標準学習整理・研究上の注意点を分け、断定しすぎない説明にします。");
   903:   blocks.push("");
   904:   blocks.push("## 6. 誤解防止");
   905:   blocks.push("制度や事件を単発で完成したものとして扱わず、時系列・後続制度・史料上の注意と接続して説明します。");
   906:   blocks.push("");
   907:   blocks.push("## 7. 次工程");
   908:   blocks.push("依頼元アプリは summary_text と deliverable_link を保存し、必要に応じて追加条件を指定して再生成できます。");
   909: 
   910:   return blocks.join("\n");
   911: }

   913: function aiwB6R95R3Z24EnhanceDeliverableWithCxMaterial(deliverable, payload, sourceRouteCode) {
   914:   const safeDeliverable = deliverable || {};
   915:   const originalBody = aiwB6R95R3Z24Text(safeDeliverable.bodyMarkdown || safeDeliverable.body_markdown || "");
   916:   const instruction = aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload);
   917:   const normalizedBody = originalBody.replace(/\s+/g, "");
   918:   const normalizedInstruction = instruction.replace(/\s+/g, "");
   919:   const echoRisk = normalizedInstruction && normalizedBody.includes(normalizedInstruction.slice(0, Math.min(120, normalizedInstruction.length)));
   920: 
   921:   const rows = aiwB6R95R3Z24FetchCxRuntimeMaterials(payload);
   922: 
   923:   if (!rows.length) {
   924:     safeDeliverable.generationBasis = Object.assign({}, safeDeliverable.generationBasis || {}, {
   925:       cx_material_patch_code: "B6R95R3Z-R24",
   926:       cx_material_rows_found: 0,
   927:       cx_material_body_enhanced: false
   928:     });
   929:     return safeDeliverable;
   930:   }
   931: 
   932:   const enhancedBody = aiwB6R95R3Z24BuildMaterialMarkdown(payload, rows);
   933: 
   934:   if (echoRisk || enhancedBody.length > originalBody.length) {
   935:     safeDeliverable.bodyMarkdown = enhancedBody;
   936:     safeDeliverable.summaryText = "CX22073JWのruntime materialを参照し、" + aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload) + " の詳細資料を生成しました。";
   937:     safeDeliverable.qualityNotes = [
   938:       "CX material rows used: " + String(rows.length),
   939:       "selector/material path: runtime readable brain material v3/v2/v1 fallback",
   940:       "body generation patch: B6R95R3Z-R24",
   941:       "source_route_code: " + String(sourceRouteCode || "")
   942:     ].join("\n");
   943:   }
   944: 
   945:   safeDeliverable.robotContext = Object.assign({}, safeDeliverable.robotContext || {}, {
   946:     cx_material_rows_used: rows.length,
   947:     cx_material_patch_code: "B6R95R3Z-R24"
   948:   });
   949: 
   950:   safeDeliverable.generationBasis = Object.assign({}, safeDeliverable.generationBasis || {}, {
   951:     cx_material_patch_code: "B6R95R3Z-R24",
   952:     cx_material_rows_found: rows.length,
   953:     cx_material_body_enhanced: true,
   954:     source: "CX22073JW runtime readable brain material"
   955:   });
   956: 
   957:   return safeDeliverable;
   958: }

   966: // AIWORKEROS_B6R95R3D_R1_MULTI_ARTIFACT_ZIP_CONTRACT_START
   967: /*
   968:   B6R95R3D-R1:
   969:   Multi-artifact deliverable zip package contract.
   970: 
   971:   Canon:
   972:   - AIWorkerOS creates one or more deliverable artifacts from the instruction.
   973:   - AIWorkerOS creates summary_text.
   974:   - AIWorkerOS bundles generated artifacts into one deliverable zip.
   975:   - Requester apps display summary_text and link to the zip.
   976:   - The zip exists to avoid one-by-one downloads when multiple artifacts are generated.
   977: 
   978:   Boundary:
   979:   - No external execution.
   980:   - No PG apply.
   981:   - No destructive action.
   982:   - No requester-app-specific contract.
   983: */
   984: function aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(value, fallback) {
   985:   const raw = String(value || fallback || "deliverable").trim();
   986:   const safe = raw.replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+/g, "_").replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "").slice(0, 80);
   987:   return safe || String(fallback || "deliverable");
   988: }

   990: function aiwB6R95R3D1BuildZipPackageMeta(requesterAppRef, taskTitle) {
   991:   const crypto = require("crypto");
   992:   const zipId = `${Date.now()}_${crypto.randomUUID()}`;
   993:   const requesterPart = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(requesterAppRef, "requester");
   994:   const titlePart = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(taskTitle, "deliverables");
   995:   const rawFileName = `${requesterPart}_${titlePart}_${zipId}.zip`;
   996: 
   997:   // AIWORKEROS_B6R95R3H_PACKAGE_META_ZIP_LINK_BEFORE_DB_FIX
   998:   // The package metadata is saved to DB before the zip file is written.
   999:   // Therefore file_name / zip_link must already use the exact sanitized filename
  1000:   // that will be written to disk by aiwB6R95R3D1CreateZipAndAttach.
  1001:   const fileName = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables.zip").endsWith(".zip")
  1002:     ? aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables.zip")
  1003:     : `${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables")}.zip`;
  1004:   const zipLink = `aiworkeros://runtime-deliverable-zip/${fileName}`;
  1005: 
  1006:   return {
  1007:     package_kind: "deliverable_zip",
  1008:     package_format: "zip",
  1009:     mime_type: "application/zip",

--- WINDOW pattern=body_markdown line=1025 start=970 end=1119 ---

   974:   - AIWorkerOS bundles generated artifacts into one deliverable zip.
   975:   - Requester apps display summary_text and link to the zip.
   976:   - The zip exists to avoid one-by-one downloads when multiple artifacts are generated.

   979:   - No external execution.

   984: function aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(value, fallback) {
   985:   const raw = String(value || fallback || "deliverable").trim();
   986:   const safe = raw.replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+/g, "_").replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "").slice(0, 80);
   987:   return safe || String(fallback || "deliverable");

   990: function aiwB6R95R3D1BuildZipPackageMeta(requesterAppRef, taskTitle) {
   991:   const crypto = require("crypto");
   992:   const zipId = `${Date.now()}_${crypto.randomUUID()}`;
   993:   const requesterPart = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(requesterAppRef, "requester");
   994:   const titlePart = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(taskTitle, "deliverables");
   995:   const rawFileName = `${requesterPart}_${titlePart}_${zipId}.zip`;
   996: 
   997:   // AIWORKEROS_B6R95R3H_PACKAGE_META_ZIP_LINK_BEFORE_DB_FIX
   998:   // The package metadata is saved to DB before the zip file is written.
   999:   // Therefore file_name / zip_link must already use the exact sanitized filename
  1000:   // that will be written to disk by aiwB6R95R3D1CreateZipAndAttach.
  1001:   const fileName = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables.zip").endsWith(".zip")
  1002:     ? aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables.zip")
  1003:     : `${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables")}.zip`;
  1004:   const zipLink = `aiworkeros://runtime-deliverable-zip/${fileName}`;
  1005: 
  1006:   return {
  1007:     package_kind: "deliverable_zip",
  1008:     package_format: "zip",
  1009:     mime_type: "application/zip",
  1010:     zip_id: zipId,
  1011:     file_name: fileName,
  1012:     zip_link: zipLink,
  1013:     zip_ref: {
  1014:       source: "aiworkeros",
  1015:       storage_code: "runtime-deliverable-zip",
  1016:       file_name: fileName
  1017:     }
  1018:   };
  1019: }

  1021: function aiwB6R95R3D1NormalizeGeneratedArtifact(item, index) {
  1022:   const seq = String(index + 1).padStart(2, "0");
  1023:   const kind = aiwB6R95R3R3OneLine(item?.artifact_kind_code || item?.kind || "document", "document");
  1024:   const title = aiwB6R95R3R3OneLine(item?.title || item?.artifact_title_ja || `成果物${seq}`, `成果物${seq}`);
  1025:   const body = aiwB6R95R3R3Text(item?.body_markdown || item?.body_text || item?.content || "");
  1026:   const suggestedName = item?.file_name || `${seq}_${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(title, `artifact_${seq}`)}.md`;
  1027:   const fileName = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}.md`).endsWith(".md")
  1028:     ? aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}.md`)
  1029:     : `${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}`)}.md`;
  1030:   return {
  1031:     artifact_no: index + 1,
  1032:     artifact_kind_code: kind,
  1033:     title,
  1034:     file_name: fileName,
  1035:     body_markdown: body,
  1036:     body_format: "markdown"
  1037:   };

  1042:   if (provided.length > 0) {

  1060:       body_markdown: deliverable.qualityNotes
  1061:     });

  1084: 
  1085: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32(buffer) {
  1086:   let table = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table;
  1087:   if (!table) {
  1088:     table = new Uint32Array(256);
  1089:     for (let i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
  1090:       let c = i;
  1091:       for (let k = 0; k < 8; k++) {
  1092:         c = (c & 1) ? (0xedb88320 ^ (c >>> 1)) : (c >>> 1);
  1093:       }
  1094:       table[i] = c >>> 0;
  1095:     }
  1096:     aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table = table;
  1097:   }
  1098:   let crc = 0xffffffff;
  1099:   for (const byte of buffer) {
  1100:     crc = table[(crc ^ byte) & 0xff] ^ (crc >>> 8);
  1101:   }
  1102:   return (crc ^ 0xffffffff) >>> 0;
  1103: }
  1104: 
  1105: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipDosDateTime(date) {
  1106:   const year = Math.max(1980, date.getFullYear());
  1107:   const dosTime = (date.getHours() << 11) | (date.getMinutes() << 5) | Math.floor(date.getSeconds() / 2);
  1108:   const dosDate = ((year - 1980) << 9) | ((date.getMonth() + 1) << 5) | date.getDate();
  1109:   return { dosTime, dosDate };
  1110: }
  1111:

  1113:   const localParts = [];
  1114:   const centralParts = [];
  1115:   let offset = 0;
  1116:   const now = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipDosDateTime(new Date());
  1117: 
  1118:   for (const entry of entries) {
  1119:     const nameBuffer = Buffer.from(entry.name, "utf8");

   980:   - No PG apply.
   981:   - No destructive action.
   982:   - No requester-app-specific contract.
   983: */
   984: function aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(value, fallback) {
   985:   const raw = String(value || fallback || "deliverable").trim();
   986:   const safe = raw.replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+/g, "_").replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "").slice(0, 80);
   987:   return safe || String(fallback || "deliverable");
   988: }
   989: 
   990: function aiwB6R95R3D1BuildZipPackageMeta(requesterAppRef, taskTitle) {
   991:   const crypto = require("crypto");
   992:   const zipId = `${Date.now()}_${crypto.randomUUID()}`;
   993:   const requesterPart = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(requesterAppRef, "requester");
   994:   const titlePart = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(taskTitle, "deliverables");
   995:   const rawFileName = `${requesterPart}_${titlePart}_${zipId}.zip`;
   996: 
   997:   // AIWORKEROS_B6R95R3H_PACKAGE_META_ZIP_LINK_BEFORE_DB_FIX
   998:   // The package metadata is saved to DB before the zip file is written.
   999:   // Therefore file_name / zip_link must already use the exact sanitized filename
  1000:   // that will be written to disk by aiwB6R95R3D1CreateZipAndAttach.
  1001:   const fileName = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables.zip").endsWith(".zip")
  1002:     ? aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables.zip")
  1003:     : `${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables")}.zip`;
  1004:   const zipLink = `aiworkeros://runtime-deliverable-zip/${fileName}`;
  1005: 
  1006:   return {
  1007:     package_kind: "deliverable_zip",
  1008:     package_format: "zip",
  1009:     mime_type: "application/zip",
  1010:     zip_id: zipId,
  1011:     file_name: fileName,
  1012:     zip_link: zipLink,
  1013:     zip_ref: {
  1014:       source: "aiworkeros",
  1015:       storage_code: "runtime-deliverable-zip",
  1016:       file_name: fileName
  1017:     }
  1018:   };
  1019: }
  1020: 
  1021: function aiwB6R95R3D1NormalizeGeneratedArtifact(item, index) {
  1022:   const seq = String(index + 1).padStart(2, "0");
  1023:   const kind = aiwB6R95R3R3OneLine(item?.artifact_kind_code || item?.kind || "document", "document");
  1024:   const title = aiwB6R95R3R3OneLine(item?.title || item?.artifact_title_ja || `成果物${seq}`, `成果物${seq}`);
  1025:   const body = aiwB6R95R3R3Text(item?.body_markdown || item?.body_text || item?.content || "");
  1026:   const suggestedName = item?.file_name || `${seq}_${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(title, `artifact_${seq}`)}.md`;
  1027:   const fileName = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}.md`).endsWith(".md")
  1028:     ? aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}.md`)
  1029:     : `${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(suggestedName, `artifact_${seq}`)}.md`;
  1030:   return {
  1031:     artifact_no: index + 1,
  1032:     artifact_kind_code: kind,
  1033:     title,
  1034:     file_name: fileName,
  1035:     body_markdown: body,
  1036:     body_format: "markdown"
  1037:   };
  1038: }

  1112: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipStored(entries) {
  1113:   const localParts = [];
  1114:   const centralParts = [];
  1115:   let offset = 0;
  1116:   const now = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipDosDateTime(new Date());
  1117: 
  1118:   for (const entry of entries) {
  1119:     const nameBuffer = Buffer.from(entry.name, "utf8");
  1120:     const dataBuffer = Buffer.from(String(entry.content ?? ""), "utf8");
  1121:     const crc = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32(dataBuffer);
  1122: 
  1123:     const local = Buffer.alloc(30);
  1124:     local.writeUInt32LE(0x04034b50, 0);
  1125:     local.writeUInt16LE(20, 4);
  1126:     local.writeUInt16LE(0, 6);
  1127:     local.writeUInt16LE(0, 8);
  1128:     local.writeUInt16LE(now.dosTime, 10);
  1129:     local.writeUInt16LE(now.dosDate, 12);
  1130:     local.writeUInt32LE(crc, 14);
  1131:     local.writeUInt32LE(dataBuffer.length, 18);
  1132:     local.writeUInt32LE(dataBuffer.length, 22);
  1133:     local.writeUInt16LE(nameBuffer.length, 26);
  1134:     local.writeUInt16LE(0, 28);
  1135:     localParts.push(local, nameBuffer, dataBuffer);
  1136: 
  1137:     const central = Buffer.alloc(46);
  1138:     central.writeUInt32LE(0x02014b50, 0);
  1139:     central.writeUInt16LE(20, 4);
  1140:     central.writeUInt16LE(20, 6);
  1141:     central.writeUInt16LE(0, 8);
  1142:     central.writeUInt16LE(0, 10);
  1143:     central.writeUInt16LE(now.dosTime, 12);
  1144:     central.writeUInt16LE(now.dosDate, 14);
  1145:     central.writeUInt32LE(crc, 16);

  1085: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32(buffer) {
  1086:   let table = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table;
  1087:   if (!table) {
  1088:     table = new Uint32Array(256);
  1089:     for (let i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
  1090:       let c = i;
  1091:       for (let k = 0; k < 8; k++) {
  1092:         c = (c & 1) ? (0xedb88320 ^ (c >>> 1)) : (c >>> 1);
  1093:       }
  1094:       table[i] = c >>> 0;
  1095:     }
  1096:     aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table = table;
  1097:   }
  1098:   let crc = 0xffffffff;
  1099:   for (const byte of buffer) {
  1100:     crc = table[(crc ^ byte) & 0xff] ^ (crc >>> 8);
  1101:   }
  1102:   return (crc ^ 0xffffffff) >>> 0;
  1103: }
  1104: 
  1105: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipDosDateTime(date) {
  1106:   const year = Math.max(1980, date.getFullYear());
  1107:   const dosTime = (date.getHours() << 11) | (date.getMinutes() << 5) | Math.floor(date.getSeconds() / 2);
  1108:   const dosDate = ((year - 1980) << 9) | ((date.getMonth() + 1) << 5) | date.getDate();
  1109:   return { dosTime, dosDate };
  1110: }

  1164:   eocd.writeUInt16LE(0, 4);

  1175: function aiwB6R95R3D1CreateZipAndAttach(responsePayload, deliverable) {
  1176:   const fs = require("fs");
  1177:   const path = require("path");
  1178: 
  1179:   const response = responsePayload && typeof responsePayload === "object" ? responsePayload : {};
  1180:   const packageMeta = deliverable?.deliverablePackage || aiwB6R95R3D1BuildZipPackageMeta("requester", "deliverables");
  1181:   const generatedArtifacts = aiwB6R95R3D1BuildGeneratedArtifacts(deliverable);
  1182: 
  1183:   const zipDir = process.env.AIWORKEROS_DELIVERABLE_ZIP_DIR || path.join(process.cwd(), "runtime-deliverable-zips");
  1184:   fs.mkdirSync(zipDir, { recursive: true });
  1185: 
  1186:   const fileName = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(packageMeta.file_name, "deliverables.zip").endsWith(".zip")
  1187:     ? aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(packageMeta.file_name, "deliverables.zip")
  1188:     : `${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(packageMeta.file_name, "deliverables")}.zip`;
  1189:   const zipPath = path.join(zipDir, fileName);
  1190: 
  1191:   // AIWORKEROS_B6R95R3F_ZIP_LINK_ACTUAL_FILE_FIX
  1192:   // Keep the returned zip link aligned with the actual sanitized filename written to disk.
  1193:   const actualZipLink = `aiworkeros://runtime-deliverable-zip/${fileName}`;
  1194:   const actualZipRef = Object.assign({}, packageMeta.zip_ref || {}, {
  1195:     source: "aiworkeros",
  1196:     storage_code: "runtime-deliverable-zip",
  1197:     file_name: fileName
  1198:   });
  1199: 
  1200:   const summaryText = response.deliverable?.summary_text || deliverable?.summaryText || "";
  1201:   const manifest = {
  1202:     contract_version: "B6R95R3D-R1",
  1203:     contract_name: "aiworkeros_common_requester_multi_artifact_zip_contract",
  1204:     package_purpose: "bundle_generated_artifacts_for_single_download",
  1205:     request_id: response.request_id || null,
  1206:     output_id: response.output_id || null,
  1207:     deliverable_title: response.deliverable?.title || deliverable?.outputTitle || "成果物",
  1208:     summary_text: summaryText,
  1209:     artifact_count: generatedArtifacts.length,
  1210:     generated_artifacts: generatedArtifacts.map((artifact) => ({
  1211:       artifact_no: artifact.artifact_no,
  1212:       artifact_kind_code: artifact.artifact_kind_code,
  1213:       title: artifact.title,
  1214:       file_name: artifact.file_name,
  1215:       body_format: artifact.body_format
  1216:     })),
  1217:     deliverable_ref: response.deliverable_ref || null,
  1218:     robot_context: response.robot_context || deliverable?.robotContext || null,
  1219:     generation_basis: response.generation_basis || deliverable?.generationBasis || null,
  1220:     safety: response.safety || null,
  1221:     created_at: new Date().toISOString()
  1222:   };
  1223: 
  1224:   const entries = [
  1225:     { name: "00_summary.md", content: summaryText },
  1226:     ...generatedArtifacts.map((artifact) => ({
  1227:       name: artifact.file_name,
  1228:       content: artifact.body_markdown
  1229:     })),
  1230:     { name: "manifest.json", content: JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2) }
  1231:   ];
  1232: 
  1233:   const zipBuffer = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipStored(entries);
  1234:   fs.writeFileSync(zipPath, zipBuffer);
  1235:   const stat = fs.statSync(zipPath);
  1236: 
  1237:   const zipPublic = {
  1238:     package_kind: "deliverable_zip",
  1239:     package_format: "zip",
  1240:     mime_type: "application/zip",
  1241:     zip_id: packageMeta.zip_id,
  1242:     file_name: fileName,
  1243:     zip_link: actualZipLink,
  1244:     zip_ref: actualZipRef,
  1245:     byte_size: stat.size,
  1246:     entry_count: entries.length,
  1247:     artifact_count: generatedArtifacts.length,
  1248:     created_at: manifest.created_at
  1249:   };
  1250: 
  1251:   response.generated_artifacts = generatedArtifacts.map((artifact) => ({
  1252:     artifact_no: artifact.artifact_no,
  1253:     artifact_kind_code: artifact.artifact_kind_code,
  1254:     title: artifact.title,
  1255:     file_name: artifact.file_name,
  1256:     body_format: artifact.body_format

  1258:   response.deliverable_package = zipPublic;

  1432:         destructive_action: false
  1433:       });
  1434:     }

   370: function appReadPayload(query) {
   371:   return psqlJson(`
   372:     select coalesce(jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(t) order by request_created_at desc), '[]'::jsonb)::text
   373:     from (
   374:       select p.*, rr.source_route_code
   375:       from aiworker.vw_app_aiworker_runtime_execution_app_read_payload_v1 p
   376:       left join aiworker.runtime_execution_request rr
   377:         on rr.request_id = p.request_id
   378:       where (nullif(:'request_id','') is null or p.request_id::text = :'request_id')
   379:         and (nullif(:'request_code','') is null or p.request_code = :'request_code')
   380:         and (nullif(:'app_surface_code','') is null or p.app_surface_code = :'app_surface_code')
   381:       order by p.request_created_at desc
   382:       limit :'limit'
   383:     ) t;
   384:   `, {
   385:     request_id: query.get("request_id") || "",
   386:     request_code: query.get("request_code") || "",
   387:     app_surface_code: query.get("app_surface_code") || "",
   388:     limit: normalizeLimit(query.get("limit"))
   389:   });
   390: }
   391: 
   392: function deliveryBoard(query) {
   393:   return psqlJson(`
   394:     select coalesce(jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(t) order by created_at desc), '[]'::jsonb)::text
   395:     from (
   396:       select *
   397:       from aiworker.vw_app_aiworker_runtime_delivery_board_v1
   398:       where (nullif(:'request_id','') is null or request_id::text = :'request_id')
   399:         and (nullif(:'request_code','') is null or request_code = :'request_code')
   400:       order by created_at desc
   401:       limit :'limit'
   402:     ) t;
   403:   `, {
   404:     request_id: query.get("request_id") || "",
   405:     request_code: query.get("request_code") || "",
   406:     limit: normalizeLimit(query.get("limit"))
   407:   });
   408: }

   411: // AIWORKEROS_B6R95R3B_R3_COMMON_DELIVERABLE_CONTRACT_START
   412: /*
   413:   B6R95R3B-R3:
   414:   Common requester-facing deliverable contract for AIWorkerOS runtime execution.
   415: 
   416:   Canon:
   417:   - This is not AICM-specific.
   418:   - AICM is one consumer among multiple requester apps / OSs.
   419:   - AIWorkerOS creates the deliverable body and first summary.
   420:   - Requester apps store summary_text plus deliverable_ref / deliverable_link.
   421:   - Robot performance differences are represented through robot_context and generation_basis.
   422: 
   423:   Boundary:
   424:   - No external execution.
   425:   - No PG apply.
   426:   - No destructive action.
   427:   - No AICM-side change in this patch.
   428:   - No CX22073JW access-control change in this patch.
   429: */
   430: function aiwB6R95R3R3Text(value) {
   431:   return String(value ?? "").replace(/\r\n/g, "\n").trim();
   432: }
   433: 
   434: function aiwB6R95R3R3OneLine(value, fallback) {
   435:   const text = aiwB6R95R3R3Text(value || fallback || "");
   436:   return text.replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();

   440:   const text = aiwB6R95R3R3Text(value);
   441:   if (text.length <= maxLen) return text;
   442:   return `${text.slice(0, maxLen)}…`;
   443: }
   444: 
   445: function aiwB6R95R3R3Lines(items) {
   446:   return items.filter((value) => value !== null && value !== undefined && String(value).trim() !== "").join("\n");
   447: }

   638: /* B6R95R3Z_R24_CX_MATERIAL_BODY_GENERATION_PATCH_START */
   639: function aiwB6R95R3Z24Text(value) {
   640:   if (value == null) return "";
   641:   if (typeof value === "string") return value;
   642:   try { return JSON.stringify(value); } catch { return String(value); }
   643: }
   644: 
   645: function aiwB6R95R3Z24SqlLiteral(value) {
   646:   return "'" + String(value || "").replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
   647: }
   648: 
   649: function aiwB6R95R3Z24PickFirstText(obj, keys) {
   650:   if (!obj || typeof obj !== "object") return "";
   651:   for (const key of keys) {
   652:     if (typeof obj[key] === "string" && obj[key].trim()) return obj[key].trim();
   653:   }
   654:   return "";
   655: }
   656: 
   657: function aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(value, maxLen = 5000, depth = 0) {
   658:   if (value == null || depth > 5) return "";
   659:   if (typeof value === "string") return value.slice(0, maxLen);
   660:   if (typeof value !== "object") return String(value).slice(0, maxLen);
   661: 
   662:   const parts = [];
   663:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
   664:     for (const item of value.slice(0, 12)) {
   665:       const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(item, maxLen, depth + 1);
   666:       if (t) parts.push(t);
   667:     }
   668:   } else {
   669:     const preferred = [
   670:       "unit_title_ja",
   671:       "unit_summary_ja",
   672:       "unit_body_ja",
   673:       "title_ja",
   674:       "summary_ja",
   675:       "body_ja",
   676:       "content_ja",
   677:       "description_ja",
   678:       "robot_use_summary_ja",
   679:       "source_caution_ja",
   680:       "misconception_guard_ja",
   681:       "topic_label_ja",
   682:       "brain_data_code",
   683:       "detail_axis_code"
   684:     ];
   685:     for (const key of preferred) {
   686:       if (value[key]) {
   687:         const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(value[key], maxLen, depth + 1);
   688:         if (t) parts.push(t);
   689:       }
   690:     }
   691:     if (!parts.length) {
   692:       for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(value).slice(0, 30)) {
   693:         if (/secret|token|password|key/i.test(k)) continue;
   694:         const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(v, maxLen, depth + 1);
   695:         if (t) parts.push(t);
   696:       }
   697:     }
   698:   }
   699: 
   700:   return parts.join("\n").slice(0, maxLen);
   701: }
   702: 
   703: function aiwB6R95R3Z24PayloadText(payload, keys) {
   704:   for (const key of keys) {
   705:     if (payload && typeof payload[key] === "string" && payload[key].trim()) return payload[key].trim();
   706:   }

   869: function aiwB6R95R3Z24BuildMaterialMarkdown(payload, rows) {
   870:   const title = aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload);
   871:   const modelCode = aiwB6R95R3Z24ModelCode(payload);
   872:   const instruction = aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload);
   873: 
   874:   const blocks = [];
   875:   blocks.push("# " + title);
   876:   blocks.push("");
   877:   blocks.push("## 1. 成果物サマリ");
   878:   blocks.push("AIWorkerOSがCX22073JWのruntime materialを参照し、依頼内容に対応する詳細資料として再構成した成果物です。");
   879:   blocks.push("");
   880:   blocks.push("## 2. 生成主体");
   881:   blocks.push("- generation_owner: AIWorkerOS");
   882:   blocks.push("- model_code: " + modelCode);
   883:   blocks.push("- cx_reference_source: CX22073JW runtime material / selector v2 readable brain material");
   884:   blocks.push("- safety_boundary: internal_only_no_external_execution_no_pg_apply_no_destructive_action");
   885:   blocks.push("");
   886:   blocks.push("## 3. 依頼要旨");
   887:   blocks.push(instruction || "依頼文なし");
   888:   blocks.push("");
   889:   blocks.push("## 4. CX参照素材からの展開本文");
   890: 
   891:   rows.slice(0, 16).forEach((row, index) => {
   892:     const title = aiwB6R95R3Z24MaterialTitle(row, index);
   893:     const body = aiwB6R95R3Z24MaterialBody(row).trim();
   894: 
   895:     blocks.push("");
   896:     blocks.push("### 4." + String(index + 1) + " " + title);
   897:     blocks.push(body ? body.slice(0, 2600) : "本文なし");
   898:   });
   899: 
   900:   blocks.push("");
   901:   blocks.push("## 5. 出典・史料注意");
   902:   blocks.push("CX側materialに source_basis / source_caution / verification_status が含まれる場合は、それを優先して扱います。歴史資料では、一次史料・標準学習整理・研究上の注意点を分け、断定しすぎない説明にします。");
   903:   blocks.push("");
   904:   blocks.push("## 6. 誤解防止");
   905:   blocks.push("制度や事件を単発で完成したものとして扱わず、時系列・後続制度・史料上の注意と接続して説明します。");
   906:   blocks.push("");
   907:   blocks.push("## 7. 次工程");

   909:

   913: function aiwB6R95R3Z24EnhanceDeliverableWithCxMaterial(deliverable, payload, sourceRouteCode) {
   914:   const safeDeliverable = deliverable || {};

   917:   const normalizedBody = originalBody.replace(/\s+/g, "");
   918:   const normalizedInstruction = instruction.replace(/\s+/g, "");
   919:   const echoRisk = normalizedInstruction && normalizedBody.includes(normalizedInstruction.slice(0, Math.min(120, normalizedInstruction.length)));
   920: 
   921:   const rows = aiwB6R95R3Z24FetchCxRuntimeMaterials(payload);
   922: 
   923:   if (!rows.length) {
   924:     safeDeliverable.generationBasis = Object.assign({}, safeDeliverable.generationBasis || {}, {
   925:       cx_material_patch_code: "B6R95R3Z-R24",
   926:       cx_material_rows_found: 0,
   927:       cx_material_body_enhanced: false
   928:     });
   929:     return safeDeliverable;
   930:   }
   931: 
   932:   const enhancedBody = aiwB6R95R3Z24BuildMaterialMarkdown(payload, rows);

   935:     safeDeliverable.bodyMarkdown = enhancedBody;

   938:       "CX material rows used: " + String(rows.length),
   939:       "selector/material path: runtime readable brain material v3/v2/v1 fallback",
   940:       "body generation patch: B6R95R3Z-R24",
   941:       "source_route_code: " + String(sourceRouteCode || "")
   942:     ].join("\n");
   943:   }
   944: 
   945:   safeDeliverable.robotContext = Object.assign({}, safeDeliverable.robotContext || {}, {
   946:     cx_material_rows_used: rows.length,
   947:     cx_material_patch_code: "B6R95R3Z-R24"
   948:   });
   949:

   968:   B6R95R3D-R1:
   969:   Multi-artifact deliverable zip package contract.

   971:   Canon:
   972:   - AIWorkerOS creates one or more deliverable artifacts from the instruction.
   973:   - AIWorkerOS creates summary_text.
   974:   - AIWorkerOS bundles generated artifacts into one deliverable zip.
   975:   - Requester apps display summary_text and link to the zip.
   976:   - The zip exists to avoid one-by-one downloads when multiple artifacts are generated.
   977: 
   978:   Boundary:
   979:   - No external execution.
   980:   - No PG apply.
   981:   - No destructive action.

   984: function aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(value, fallback) {
   985:   const raw = String(value || fallback || "deliverable").trim();
   986:   const safe = raw.replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+/g, "_").replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "").slice(0, 80);
   987:   return safe || String(fallback || "deliverable");
   988: }

   990: function aiwB6R95R3D1BuildZipPackageMeta(requesterAppRef, taskTitle) {
   991:   const crypto = require("crypto");
   992:   const zipId = `${Date.now()}_${crypto.randomUUID()}`;
   993:   const requesterPart = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(requesterAppRef, "requester");
   994:   const titlePart = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(taskTitle, "deliverables");
   995:   const rawFileName = `${requesterPart}_${titlePart}_${zipId}.zip`;
   996: 
   997:   // AIWORKEROS_B6R95R3H_PACKAGE_META_ZIP_LINK_BEFORE_DB_FIX
   998:   // The package metadata is saved to DB before the zip file is written.
   999:   // Therefore file_name / zip_link must already use the exact sanitized filename
  1000:   // that will be written to disk by aiwB6R95R3D1CreateZipAndAttach.
  1001:   const fileName = aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables.zip").endsWith(".zip")
  1002:     ? aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables.zip")
  1003:     : `${aiwB6R95R3D1SafeFilePart(rawFileName, "deliverables")}.zip`;
  1004:   const zipLink = `aiworkeros://runtime-deliverable-zip/${fileName}`;
  1005: 
  1006:   return {
  1007:     package_kind: "deliverable_zip",
  1008:     package_format: "zip",
  1009:     mime_type: "application/zip",
  1010:     zip_id: zipId,
  1011:     file_name: fileName,
  1012:     zip_link: zipLink,
  1013:     zip_ref: {
  1014:       source: "aiworkeros",
  1015:       storage_code: "runtime-deliverable-zip",
  1016:       file_name: fileName
  1017:     }
  1018:   };
  1019: }

   638: /* B6R95R3Z_R24_CX_MATERIAL_BODY_GENERATION_PATCH_START */
   639: function aiwB6R95R3Z24Text(value) {
   640:   if (value == null) return "";
   641:   if (typeof value === "string") return value;
   642:   try { return JSON.stringify(value); } catch { return String(value); }
   643: }
   644: 
   645: function aiwB6R95R3Z24SqlLiteral(value) {
   646:   return "'" + String(value || "").replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
   647: }
   648: 
   649: function aiwB6R95R3Z24PickFirstText(obj, keys) {
   650:   if (!obj || typeof obj !== "object") return "";
   651:   for (const key of keys) {
   652:     if (typeof obj[key] === "string" && obj[key].trim()) return obj[key].trim();
   653:   }
   654:   return "";
   655: }

   657: function aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(value, maxLen = 5000, depth = 0) {
   658:   if (value == null || depth > 5) return "";
   659:   if (typeof value === "string") return value.slice(0, maxLen);
   660:   if (typeof value !== "object") return String(value).slice(0, maxLen);
   661: 
   662:   const parts = [];

   664:     for (const item of value.slice(0, 12)) {
   665:       const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(item, maxLen, depth + 1);
   666:       if (t) parts.push(t);
   667:     }
   668:   } else {
   669:     const preferred = [
   670:       "unit_title_ja",
   671:       "unit_summary_ja",
   672:       "unit_body_ja",

   682:       "brain_data_code",
   683:       "detail_axis_code"
   684:     ];

   686:       if (value[key]) {
   687:         const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(value[key], maxLen, depth + 1);
   688:         if (t) parts.push(t);
   689:       }

   695:         if (t) parts.push(t);
   696:       }
   697:     }
   698:   }
   699: 
   700:   return parts.join("\n").slice(0, maxLen);
   701: }

  1085: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32(buffer) {
  1086:   let table = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table;
  1087:   if (!table) {
  1088:     table = new Uint32Array(256);
  1089:     for (let i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
  1090:       let c = i;
  1091:       for (let k = 0; k < 8; k++) {
  1092:         c = (c & 1) ? (0xedb88320 ^ (c >>> 1)) : (c >>> 1);
  1093:       }
  1094:       table[i] = c >>> 0;
  1095:     }
  1096:     aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table = table;
  1097:   }
  1098:   let crc = 0xffffffff;
  1099:   for (const byte of buffer) {
  1100:     crc = table[(crc ^ byte) & 0xff] ^ (crc >>> 8);
  1101:   }
  1102:   return (crc ^ 0xffffffff) >>> 0;
  1103: }
  1104: 
  1105: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipDosDateTime(date) {
  1106:   const year = Math.max(1980, date.getFullYear());
  1107:   const dosTime = (date.getHours() << 11) | (date.getMinutes() << 5) | Math.floor(date.getSeconds() / 2);
  1108:   const dosDate = ((year - 1980) << 9) | ((date.getMonth() + 1) << 5) | date.getDate();
  1109:   return { dosTime, dosDate };
  1110: }

  1084: 
  1085: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32(buffer) {
  1086:   let table = aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table;
  1087:   if (!table) {
  1088:     table = new Uint32Array(256);
  1089:     for (let i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
  1090:       let c = i;
  1091:       for (let k = 0; k < 8; k++) {
  1092:         c = (c & 1) ? (0xedb88320 ^ (c >>> 1)) : (c >>> 1);
  1093:       }
  1094:       table[i] = c >>> 0;
  1095:     }
  1096:     aiwB6R95R3D1ZipCrc32._table = table;
  1097:   }
  1098:   let crc = 0xffffffff;
  1099:   for (const byte of buffer) {
  1100:     crc = table[(crc ^ byte) & 0xff] ^ (crc >>> 8);
  1101:   }
  1102:   return (crc ^ 0xffffffff) >>> 0;
  1103: }
  1104: 
  1105: function aiwB6R95R3D1ZipDosDateTime(date) {
  1106:   const year = Math.max(1980, date.getFullYear());
  1107:   const dosTime = (date.getHours() << 11) | (date.getMinutes() << 5) | Math.floor(date.getSeconds() / 2);
  1108:   const dosDate = ((year - 1980) << 9) | ((date.getMonth() + 1) << 5) | date.getDate();
  1109:   return { dosTime, dosDate };
  1110: }

  1452:     if (req.method === "GET" && url.pathname === "/aiworker/v1/runtime-execution/persistent-smoke") {
  1453:       return sendJson(res, 200, { result: "ok", data: persistentSmoke() });
  1454:     }
  1455: 
  1456:     if (req.method === "GET" && url.pathname === "/aiworker/v1/runtime-execution/pipeline-board") {
  1457:       return sendJson(res, 200, { result: "ok", data: pipelineBoard(url.searchParams) });
  1458:     }
  1459: 
  1460:     if (req.method === "GET" && url.pathname === "/aiworker/v1/runtime-execution/app-read-payload") {
  1461:       return sendJson(res, 200, { result: "ok", data: appReadPayload(url.searchParams) });
  1462:     }
  1463: 
  1464:     if (req.method === "GET" && url.pathname === "/aiworker/v1/runtime-execution/delivery") {
  1465:       return sendJson(res, 200, { result: "ok", data: deliveryBoard(url.searchParams) });
  1466:     }
  1467: 
  1468: 
  1469:     // BRAIN_CONTEXT_BRIDGE_ROUTE_V1
  1470:     if (req.method === "GET" && url.pathname === "/aiworker/v1/runtime-execution/brain-context") {
  1471:       const modelCode = url.searchParams.get("model_code") || url.searchParams.get("modelCode") || "";
  1472:       const usePurposeCode =
  1473:         url.searchParams.get("use_purpose_code") ||
  1474:         url.searchParams.get("purpose_code") ||
  1475:         url.searchParams.get("task_domain_code") ||
  1476:         "reference";
  1477:       const domainsRaw = url.searchParams.get("domains") || "";
  1478:       const domainCodes = domainsRaw
  1479:         ? domainsRaw.split(",").map((value) => value.trim()).filter(Boolean)
  1480:         : [];
  1481:       const includeMissingSources =
  1482:         url.searchParams.get("include_missing_sources") === "true" ||
  1483:         url.searchParams.get("includeMissingSources") === "true";
  1484: 
  1485:       const brainContext = buildRuntimeBrainContext({
  1486:         modelCode,
  1487:         usePurposeCode,
  1488:         domainCodes,
  1489:         includeMissingSources
  1490:       });
  1491: 
  1492:       return sendJson(res, 200, {
  1493:         result: "ok",
  1494:         external_execution_performed_flag: false,
  1495:         data: {
  1496:           model_code: modelCode,
  1497:           use_purpose_code: brainContext.purposeCode,

  1500:         }

     2: // AIWORKEROS_V10L_C2G_B6R44F_SOURCE_ROUTE_METADATA_START
     3: /*
     4:   B6R44F:
     5:   Preserve source route metadata from app callers.
     6:   AICompanyManager Workbench uses this to separate:
     7:   - individual_instruction
     8:   - task_ledger_worker
     9:   - president_route_worker
    10: 
    11:   This helper is intentionally generic and side-effect-free.
    12: */
    13: function aiwB6R44fPlainObject(value) {
    14:   return value && typeof value === "object" && !Array.isArray(value) ? value : {};
    15: }
    16: 
    17: function aiwB6R44fText(value) {
    18:   return value == null ? "" : String(value).trim();
    19: }
    20: 
    21: function aiwB6R44fExtractSourceRouteMetadata(input) {
    22:   const body = aiwB6R44fPlainObject(input);
    23:   const metadata = aiwB6R44fPlainObject(body.metadata_jsonb);
    24:   const appRead = aiwB6R44fPlainObject(body.app_read_payload_jsonb);
    25:   const source = aiwB6R44fPlainObject(appRead.source);
    26: 
    27:   const sourceAppRef = aiwB6R44fText(
    28:     body.source_app_ref ||
    29:     metadata.source_app_ref ||
    30:     source.source_app_ref ||
    31:     body.app_surface_code ||
    32:     "AICompanyManager"
    33:   );
    34: 
    35:   const sourceRouteCode = aiwB6R44fText(
    36:     body.source_route_code ||
    37:     metadata.source_route_code ||
    38:     source.source_route_code
    39:   );
    40: 
    41:   const sourceScreenCode = aiwB6R44fText(
    42:     body.source_screen_code ||
    43:     metadata.source_screen_code ||
    44:     source.source_screen_code
    45:   );
    46: 
    47:   const sourceEntityType = aiwB6R44fText(
    48:     body.source_entity_type ||
    49:     metadata.source_entity_type ||
    50:     source.source_entity_type
    51:   );
    52: 
    53:   const sourceEntityId = aiwB6R44fText(
    54:     body.source_entity_id ||
    55:     metadata.source_entity_id ||
    56:     source.source_entity_id ||
    57:     body.request_id ||
    58:     body.runtime_execution_request_id
    59:   );
    60: 
    61:   const route = {};
    62:   if (sourceAppRef) route.source_app_ref = sourceAppRef;
    63:   if (sourceRouteCode) route.source_route_code = sourceRouteCode;
    64:   if (sourceScreenCode) route.source_screen_code = sourceScreenCode;
    65:   if (sourceEntityType) route.source_entity_type = sourceEntityType;
    66:   if (sourceEntityId) route.source_entity_id = sourceEntityId;
    67: 
    68:   const returnTargetType = aiwB6R44fText(body.return_target_type || metadata.return_target_type || source.return_target_type);
    69:   const returnTargetId = aiwB6R44fText(body.return_target_id || metadata.return_target_id || source.return_target_id);
    70:   const reexecuteTargetType = aiwB6R44fText(body.reexecute_target_type || metadata.reexecute_target_type || source.reexecute_target_type);
    71:   const reexecuteTargetId = aiwB6R44fText(body.reexecute_target_id || metadata.reexecute_target_id || source.reexecute_target_id);
    72:   const contextRestoreType = aiwB6R44fText(body.context_restore_type || metadata.context_restore_type || source.context_restore_type);
    73:   const contextRestoreId = aiwB6R44fText(body.context_restore_id || metadata.context_restore_id || source.context_restore_id);
    74: 
    75:   if (returnTargetType) route.return_target_type = returnTargetType;
    76:   if (returnTargetId) route.return_target_id = returnTargetId;
    77:   if (reexecuteTargetType) route.reexecute_target_type = reexecuteTargetType;
    78:   if (reexecuteTargetId) route.reexecute_target_id = reexecuteTargetId;
    79:   if (contextRestoreType) route.context_restore_type = contextRestoreType;
    80:   if (contextRestoreId) route.context_restore_id = contextRestoreId;
    81: 
    82:   return route;
    83: }
    84: 
    85: function aiwB6R44fMergeSourceRouteIntoAppReadPayload(appReadPayload, input) {
    86:   const base = aiwB6R44fPlainObject(appReadPayload);
    87:   const route = aiwB6R44fExtractSourceRouteMetadata(input);
    88:   if (!route.source_route_code) return base;
    89:   return Object.assign({}, base, {
    90:     source: Object.assign({}, aiwB6R44fPlainObject(base.source), route)
    91:   });
    92: }

    94: function aiwB6R44fExposeSourceRouteOnRow(row) {
    95:   const out = Object.assign({}, aiwB6R44fPlainObject(row));
    96:   const appRead = aiwB6R44fPlainObject(out.app_read_payload_jsonb);
    97:   const source = aiwB6R44fPlainObject(appRead.source);
    98:   const route = aiwB6R44fExtractSourceRouteMetadata(Object.assign({}, out, {
    99:     metadata_jsonb: out.metadata_jsonb,
   100:     app_read_payload_jsonb: aiwB6R44fMergeSourceRouteIntoAppReadPayload(appRead, body || payload || requestBody || input || {}),
   101:     source_app_ref: out.source_app_ref || source.source_app_ref,
   102:     source_route_code: out.source_route_code || source.source_route_code,
   103:     source_screen_code: out.source_screen_code || source.source_screen_code,
   104:     source_entity_type: out.source_entity_type || source.source_entity_type,
   105:     source_entity_id: out.source_entity_id || source.source_entity_id
   106:   }));
   107: 
   108:   if (route.source_app_ref && !out.source_app_ref) out.source_app_ref = route.source_app_ref;
   109:   if (route.source_route_code && !out.source_route_code) out.source_route_code = route.source_route_code;
   110:   if (route.source_screen_code && !out.source_screen_code) out.source_screen_code = route.source_screen_code;
   111:   if (route.source_entity_type && !out.source_entity_type) out.source_entity_type = route.source_entity_type;
   112:   if (route.source_entity_id && !out.source_entity_id) out.source_entity_id = route.source_entity_id;
   113: 
   114:   if (route.source_route_code) {
   115:     out.app_read_payload_jsonb = aiwB6R44fMergeSourceRouteIntoAppReadPayload(appRead, route);
   116:   }
   117:   return out;
   118: }

   120: function aiwB6R44fExposeSourceRouteOnRows(value) {
   121:   if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.map(aiwB6R44fExposeSourceRouteOnRow);
   122:   return value;
   123: }

   127: /*

   129:   SendJson boundary wrapper.

   132: function aiwB6R44gR4PlainObject(value) {
   133:   return value && typeof value === "object" && !Array.isArray(value) ? value : {};
   134: }
   135: 
   136: function aiwB6R44gR4LooksRuntimeRow(row) {
   137:   if (!row || typeof row !== "object" || Array.isArray(row)) return false;
   138:   if (row.request_id || row.runtime_execution_request_id || row.request_code) return true;
   139:   if (row.request_status_code || row.output_status_code || row.delivery_status_code) return true;
   140:   if (row.app_surface_code || row.app_read_payload_jsonb) return true;
   141:   return false;
   142: }
   143: 
   144: function aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRouteRow(row) {
   145:   if (!aiwB6R44gR4LooksRuntimeRow(row)) return row;
   146: 
   147:   const out = aiwB6R44fExposeSourceRouteOnRow(row);
   148:   const appRead = aiwB6R44gR4PlainObject(out.app_read_payload_jsonb);
   149:   const source = aiwB6R44gR4PlainObject(appRead.source);
   150: 
   151:   if (source.source_app_ref && !out.source_app_ref) out.source_app_ref = source.source_app_ref;
   152:   if (source.source_route_code && !out.source_route_code) out.source_route_code = source.source_route_code;
   153:   if (source.source_screen_code && !out.source_screen_code) out.source_screen_code = source.source_screen_code;
   154:   if (source.source_entity_type && !out.source_entity_type) out.source_entity_type = source.source_entity_type;
   155:   if (source.source_entity_id && !out.source_entity_id) out.source_entity_id = source.source_entity_id;
   156: 
   157:   return out;
   158: }
   159: 
   160: function aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRouteRows(rows) {
   161:   if (!Array.isArray(rows)) return rows;
   162:   return rows.map(aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRouteRow);
   163: }
   164: 
   165: function aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRoutePayload(payload) {
   166:   if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object") return payload;
   167:   if (Array.isArray(payload)) return aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRouteRows(payload);
   168: 
   169:   const out = Object.assign({}, payload);
   170: 
   171:   if (Array.isArray(out.data)) {
   172:     out.data = aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRouteRows(out.data);
   173:   }
   174:   if (Array.isArray(out.rows)) {
   175:     out.rows = aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRouteRows(out.rows);
   176:   }
   177:   if (Array.isArray(out.items)) {
   178:     out.items = aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRouteRows(out.items);
   179:   }
   180:   if (out.payload && typeof out.payload === "object") {
   181:     out.payload = aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRoutePayload(out.payload);
   182:   }
   183: 
   184:   return out;
   185: }

   165: function aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRoutePayload(payload) {
   166:   if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object") return payload;

   175:     out.rows = aiwB6R44gR4ExposeSourceRouteRows(out.rows);

   177:   if (Array.isArray(out.items)) {

   182:   }

   184:   return out;

   199: function loadDotEnv(filePath) {
   200:   if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) return;
   201:   const lines = fs.readFileSync(filePath, "utf8").split(/\r?\n/);
   202:   for (const line of lines) {
   203:     if (!line || line.trim().startsWith("#")) continue;
   204:     const idx = line.indexOf("=");
   205:     if (idx < 0) continue;
   206:     const key = line.slice(0, idx).trim();
   207:     const value = line.slice(idx + 1).trim();
   208:     if (key && process.env[key] === undefined) {
   209:       process.env[key] = value;
   210:     }
   211:   }
   212: }
   213:

   411: // AIWORKEROS_B6R95R3B_R3_COMMON_DELIVERABLE_CONTRACT_START

   413:   B6R95R3B-R3:
   414:   Common requester-facing deliverable contract for AIWorkerOS runtime execution.
   415: 
   416:   Canon:
   417:   - This is not AICM-specific.

   425:   - No PG apply.

   703: function aiwB6R95R3Z24PayloadText(payload, keys) {
   704:   for (const key of keys) {
   705:     if (payload && typeof payload[key] === "string" && payload[key].trim()) return payload[key].trim();
   706:   }
   707:   for (const nestedKey of ["payload", "request_payload", "input_json", "body", "request", "runtime_request"]) {
   708:     const nested = payload && payload[nestedKey];
   709:     if (nested && typeof nested === "object") {
   710:       for (const key of keys) {
   711:         if (typeof nested[key] === "string" && nested[key].trim()) return nested[key].trim();
   712:       }
   713:     }
   714:   }
   715:   return "";
   716: }

   746: function aiwB6R95R3Z24SearchTerms(payload) {
   747:   const text = [
   748:     aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload),
   749:     aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload)
   750:   ].join("\n");
   751: 
   752:   const terms = [];
   753: 
   754:   if (/大化|taika|乙巳|改新|公地公民/.test(text)) {
   755:     terms.push("大化", "大化の改新", "taika", "乙巳", "改新の詔", "公地公民", "日本書紀", "律令");
   756:   }
   757: 
   758:   for (const m of text.matchAll(/[一-龯ぁ-んァ-ンA-Za-z0-9_]{3,}/g)) {
   759:     const v = m[0];
   760:     if (!terms.includes(v) && !/してください|成果物|summary|generated|artifacts|link|zip/.test(v)) terms.push(v);
   761:     if (terms.length >= 12) break;
   762:   }
   763: 
   764:   return terms.length ? terms : ["大化", "taika"];
   765: }
   766: 
   767: function aiwB6R95R3Z24RunPsqlJson(sql) {
   768:   let req = null;
   769:   try {
   770:     req = eval("require");
   771:   } catch {
   772:     return [];
   773:   }
   774: 
   775:   try {
   776:     const cp = req("node:child_process");
   777:     const dbUrl = process.env.PERSONA_DATABASE_URL || process.env.DATABASE_URL || "";
   778:     if (!dbUrl) return [];
   779: 
   780:     const out = cp.execFileSync("psql", [
   781:       dbUrl,
   782:       "-X",
   783:       "-q",
   784:       "-t",
   785:       "-A",
   786:       "-v",
   787:       "ON_ERROR_STOP=1",
   788:       "-c",
   789:       sql
   790:     ], {
   791:       encoding: "utf8",
   792:       timeout: 15000,
   793:       env: Object.assign({}, process.env, { PGOPTIONS: "" })
   794:     });
   795: 
   796:     const text = String(out || "").trim();
   797:     if (!text) return [];
   798:     const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
   799:     return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
   800:   } catch {
   801:     return [];
   802:   }
   803: }

   703: function aiwB6R95R3Z24PayloadText(payload, keys) {
   704:   for (const key of keys) {
   705:     if (payload && typeof payload[key] === "string" && payload[key].trim()) return payload[key].trim();
   706:   }
   707:   for (const nestedKey of ["payload", "request_payload", "input_json", "body", "request", "runtime_request"]) {
   708:     const nested = payload && payload[nestedKey];
   709:     if (nested && typeof nested === "object") {
   710:       for (const key of keys) {
   711:         if (typeof nested[key] === "string" && nested[key].trim()) return nested[key].trim();
   712:       }
   713:     }
   714:   }
   715:   return "";
   716: }

   746: function aiwB6R95R3Z24SearchTerms(payload) {
   747:   const text = [
   748:     aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload),
   749:     aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload)
   750:   ].join("\n");

   752:   const terms = [];
   753: 
   754:   if (/大化|taika|乙巳|改新|公地公民/.test(text)) {
   755:     terms.push("大化", "大化の改新", "taika", "乙巳", "改新の詔", "公地公民", "日本書紀", "律令");
   756:   }
   757: 
   758:   for (const m of text.matchAll(/[一-龯ぁ-んァ-ンA-Za-z0-9_]{3,}/g)) {
   759:     const v = m[0];
   760:     if (!terms.includes(v) && !/してください|成果物|summary|generated|artifacts|link|zip/.test(v)) terms.push(v);
   761:     if (terms.length >= 12) break;
   762:   }
   763: 
   764:   return terms.length ? terms : ["大化", "taika"];
   765: }

   767: function aiwB6R95R3Z24RunPsqlJson(sql) {
   768:   let req = null;
   769:   try {
   770:     req = eval("require");
   771:   } catch {
   772:     return [];
   773:   }
   774: 
   775:   try {
   776:     const cp = req("node:child_process");
   777:     const dbUrl = process.env.PERSONA_DATABASE_URL || process.env.DATABASE_URL || "";
   778:     if (!dbUrl) return [];
   779: 
   780:     const out = cp.execFileSync("psql", [
   781:       dbUrl,
   782:       "-X",
   783:       "-q",
   784:       "-t",
   785:       "-A",
   786:       "-v",
   787:       "ON_ERROR_STOP=1",
   788:       "-c",
   789:       sql
   790:     ], {
   791:       encoding: "utf8",
   792:       timeout: 15000,
   793:       env: Object.assign({}, process.env, { PGOPTIONS: "" })
   794:     });
   795: 
   796:     const text = String(out || "").trim();
   797:     if (!text) return [];
   798:     const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
   799:     return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
   800:   } catch {
   801:     return [];
   802:   }
   803: }

   805: function aiwB6R95R3Z24FetchCxRuntimeMaterials(payload) {

   827:       "COMMIT;",
   828:       "/* B6R95R3Z_R26_READONLY_HELPER_REPAIR */"
   829:     ].join("\n");
   830: 
   831:     const rows = aiwB6R95R3Z24RunPsqlJson(sql);

   720:     "model_code",
   721:     "robot_model_code",

   746: function aiwB6R95R3Z24SearchTerms(payload) {
   747:   const text = [
   748:     aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload),
   749:     aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload)
   750:   ].join("\n");
   751: 
   752:   const terms = [];
   753: 
   754:   if (/大化|taika|乙巳|改新|公地公民/.test(text)) {
   755:     terms.push("大化", "大化の改新", "taika", "乙巳", "改新の詔", "公地公民", "日本書紀", "律令");
   756:   }
   757: 
   758:   for (const m of text.matchAll(/[一-龯ぁ-んァ-ンA-Za-z0-9_]{3,}/g)) {
   759:     const v = m[0];
   760:     if (!terms.includes(v) && !/してください|成果物|summary|generated|artifacts|link|zip/.test(v)) terms.push(v);
   761:     if (terms.length >= 12) break;
   762:   }
   763: 
   764:   return terms.length ? terms : ["大化", "taika"];
   765: }
   766: 
   767: function aiwB6R95R3Z24RunPsqlJson(sql) {
   768:   let req = null;
   769:   try {
   770:     req = eval("require");
   771:   } catch {
   772:     return [];
   773:   }
   774: 
   775:   try {
   776:     const cp = req("node:child_process");
   777:     const dbUrl = process.env.PERSONA_DATABASE_URL || process.env.DATABASE_URL || "";
   778:     if (!dbUrl) return [];
   779: 
   780:     const out = cp.execFileSync("psql", [
   781:       dbUrl,
   782:       "-X",
   783:       "-q",
   784:       "-t",
   785:       "-A",
   786:       "-v",
   787:       "ON_ERROR_STOP=1",
   788:       "-c",
   789:       sql
   790:     ], {
   791:       encoding: "utf8",
   792:       timeout: 15000,
   793:       env: Object.assign({}, process.env, { PGOPTIONS: "" })
   794:     });
   795: 
   796:     const text = String(out || "").trim();
   797:     if (!text) return [];
   798:     const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
   799:     return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
   800:   } catch {
   801:     return [];
   802:   }
   803: }
   804: 
   805: function aiwB6R95R3Z24FetchCxRuntimeMaterials(payload) {
   806:   const modelCode = aiwB6R95R3Z24ModelCode(payload);
   807:   const terms = aiwB6R95R3Z24SearchTerms(payload);
   808:   const termConds = terms
   809:     .slice(0, 10)
   810:     .map((term) => "to_jsonb(t)::text ILIKE " + aiwB6R95R3Z24SqlLiteral("%" + term + "%"))
   811:     .join(" OR ");
   812: 
   813:   const views = [
   814:     "aiworker.vw_robot_readable_brain_runtime_material_canon_v1",];
   815: 
   816:   for (const view of views) {
   817:     const sql = [
   818:       "BEGIN READ ONLY;",
   819:       "WITH picked AS (",
   820:       "  SELECT to_jsonb(t) AS row_json",
   821:       "  FROM " + view + " t",
   822:       "  WHERE t.model_code = " + aiwB6R95R3Z24SqlLiteral(modelCode),
   823:       "    AND (" + termConds + ")",
   824:       "  LIMIT 24",
   825:       ")",
   826:       "SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(row_json), '[]'::jsonb)::text FROM picked;",
   827:       "COMMIT;",
   828:       "/* B6R95R3Z_R26_READONLY_HELPER_REPAIR */"
   829:     ].join("\n");
   830: 
   831:     const rows = aiwB6R95R3Z24RunPsqlJson(sql);
   832:     if (rows.length) return rows;
   833:   }
   834: 
   835:   return [];

   413:   B6R95R3B-R3:
   414:   Common requester-facing deliverable contract for AIWorkerOS runtime execution.
   415: 
   416:   Canon:

   703: function aiwB6R95R3Z24PayloadText(payload, keys) {
   704:   for (const key of keys) {
   705:     if (payload && typeof payload[key] === "string" && payload[key].trim()) return payload[key].trim();
   706:   }
   707:   for (const nestedKey of ["payload", "request_payload", "input_json", "body", "request", "runtime_request"]) {
   708:     const nested = payload && payload[nestedKey];
   709:     if (nested && typeof nested === "object") {
   710:       for (const key of keys) {
   711:         if (typeof nested[key] === "string" && nested[key].trim()) return nested[key].trim();
   712:       }
   713:     }
   714:   }
   715:   return "";
   716: }

   746: function aiwB6R95R3Z24SearchTerms(payload) {
   747:   const text = [
   748:     aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload),
   749:     aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload)
   750:   ].join("\n");
   751: 
   752:   const terms = [];
   753: 
   754:   if (/大化|taika|乙巳|改新|公地公民/.test(text)) {
   755:     terms.push("大化", "大化の改新", "taika", "乙巳", "改新の詔", "公地公民", "日本書紀", "律令");
   756:   }
   757: 
   758:   for (const m of text.matchAll(/[一-龯ぁ-んァ-ンA-Za-z0-9_]{3,}/g)) {
   759:     const v = m[0];
   760:     if (!terms.includes(v) && !/してください|成果物|summary|generated|artifacts|link|zip/.test(v)) terms.push(v);
   761:     if (terms.length >= 12) break;
   762:   }
   763: 
   764:   return terms.length ? terms : ["大化", "taika"];
   765: }

   767: function aiwB6R95R3Z24RunPsqlJson(sql) {
   768:   let req = null;
   769:   try {
   770:     req = eval("require");
   771:   } catch {
   772:     return [];
   773:   }
   774: 
   775:   try {
   776:     const cp = req("node:child_process");
   777:     const dbUrl = process.env.PERSONA_DATABASE_URL || process.env.DATABASE_URL || "";
   778:     if (!dbUrl) return [];
   779: 
   780:     const out = cp.execFileSync("psql", [
   781:       dbUrl,
   782:       "-X",
   783:       "-q",
   784:       "-t",
   785:       "-A",
   786:       "-v",
   787:       "ON_ERROR_STOP=1",
   788:       "-c",
   789:       sql
   790:     ], {
   791:       encoding: "utf8",
   792:       timeout: 15000,
   793:       env: Object.assign({}, process.env, { PGOPTIONS: "" })
   794:     });
   795: 
   796:     const text = String(out || "").trim();
   797:     if (!text) return [];
   798:     const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
   799:     return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
   800:   } catch {
   801:     return [];
   802:   }
   803: }
   804:

   677:       "description_ja",
   678:       "robot_use_summary_ja",
   679:       "source_caution_ja",
   680:       "misconception_guard_ja",
   681:       "topic_label_ja",
   682:       "brain_data_code",
   683:       "detail_axis_code"
   684:     ];
   685:     for (const key of preferred) {
   686:       if (value[key]) {
   687:         const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(value[key], maxLen, depth + 1);
   688:         if (t) parts.push(t);
   689:       }
   690:     }
   691:     if (!parts.length) {
   692:       for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(value).slice(0, 30)) {
   693:         if (/secret|token|password|key/i.test(k)) continue;
   694:         const t = aiwB6R95R3Z24CollectTextDeep(v, maxLen, depth + 1);
   695:         if (t) parts.push(t);
   696:       }
   697:     }
   698:   }
   699: 
   700:   return parts.join("\n").slice(0, maxLen);
   701: }

   703: function aiwB6R95R3Z24PayloadText(payload, keys) {
   704:   for (const key of keys) {
   705:     if (payload && typeof payload[key] === "string" && payload[key].trim()) return payload[key].trim();
   706:   }
   707:   for (const nestedKey of ["payload", "request_payload", "input_json", "body", "request", "runtime_request"]) {
   708:     const nested = payload && payload[nestedKey];

   710:       for (const key of keys) {
   711:         if (typeof nested[key] === "string" && nested[key].trim()) return nested[key].trim();
   712:       }
   713:     }
   714:   }
   715:   return "";

   767: function aiwB6R95R3Z24RunPsqlJson(sql) {
   768:   let req = null;
   769:   try {
   770:     req = eval("require");
   771:   } catch {
   772:     return [];
   773:   }
   774: 
   775:   try {
   776:     const cp = req("node:child_process");
   777:     const dbUrl = process.env.PERSONA_DATABASE_URL || process.env.DATABASE_URL || "";
   778:     if (!dbUrl) return [];
   779: 
   780:     const out = cp.execFileSync("psql", [
   781:       dbUrl,
   782:       "-X",
   783:       "-q",
   784:       "-t",
   785:       "-A",
   786:       "-v",
   787:       "ON_ERROR_STOP=1",
   788:       "-c",
   789:       sql
   790:     ], {
   791:       encoding: "utf8",
   792:       timeout: 15000,
   793:       env: Object.assign({}, process.env, { PGOPTIONS: "" })
   794:     });
   795: 
   796:     const text = String(out || "").trim();
   797:     if (!text) return [];
   798:     const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
   799:     return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
   800:   } catch {
   801:     return [];
   802:   }
   803: }

   805: function aiwB6R95R3Z24FetchCxRuntimeMaterials(payload) {
   806:   const modelCode = aiwB6R95R3Z24ModelCode(payload);
   807:   const terms = aiwB6R95R3Z24SearchTerms(payload);
   808:   const termConds = terms
   809:     .slice(0, 10)
   810:     .map((term) => "to_jsonb(t)::text ILIKE " + aiwB6R95R3Z24SqlLiteral("%" + term + "%"))
   811:     .join(" OR ");
   812: 
   813:   const views = [
   814:     "aiworker.vw_robot_readable_brain_runtime_material_canon_v1",];
   815: 
   816:   for (const view of views) {
   817:     const sql = [
   818:       "BEGIN READ ONLY;",
   819:       "WITH picked AS (",
   820:       "  SELECT to_jsonb(t) AS row_json",
   821:       "  FROM " + view + " t",
   822:       "  WHERE t.model_code = " + aiwB6R95R3Z24SqlLiteral(modelCode),
   823:       "    AND (" + termConds + ")",
   824:       "  LIMIT 24",
   825:       ")",
   826:       "SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(row_json), '[]'::jsonb)::text FROM picked;",
   827:       "COMMIT;",
   828:       "/* B6R95R3Z_R26_READONLY_HELPER_REPAIR */"
   829:     ].join("\n");
   830: 
   831:     const rows = aiwB6R95R3Z24RunPsqlJson(sql);
   832:     if (rows.length) return rows;
   833:   }
   834: 
   835:   return [];
   836: }

   869: function aiwB6R95R3Z24BuildMaterialMarkdown(payload, rows) {
   870:   const title = aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload);
   871:   const modelCode = aiwB6R95R3Z24ModelCode(payload);
   872:   const instruction = aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload);
   873: 
   874:   const blocks = [];
   875:   blocks.push("# " + title);
   876:   blocks.push("");
   877:   blocks.push("## 1. 成果物サマリ");
   878:   blocks.push("AIWorkerOSがCX22073JWのruntime materialを参照し、依頼内容に対応する詳細資料として再構成した成果物です。");
   879:   blocks.push("");
   880:   blocks.push("## 2. 生成主体");
   881:   blocks.push("- generation_owner: AIWorkerOS");
   882:   blocks.push("- model_code: " + modelCode);
   883:   blocks.push("- cx_reference_source: CX22073JW runtime material / selector v2 readable brain material");
   884:   blocks.push("- safety_boundary: internal_only_no_external_execution_no_pg_apply_no_destructive_action");
   885:   blocks.push("");
   886:   blocks.push("## 3. 依頼要旨");
   887:   blocks.push(instruction || "依頼文なし");
   888:   blocks.push("");
   889:   blocks.push("## 4. CX参照素材からの展開本文");
   890:

   892:     const title = aiwB6R95R3Z24MaterialTitle(row, index);
   893:     const body = aiwB6R95R3Z24MaterialBody(row).trim();

   897:     blocks.push(body ? body.slice(0, 2600) : "本文なし");
   898:   });

   900:   blocks.push("");
   901:   blocks.push("## 5. 出典・史料注意");
   902:   blocks.push("CX側materialに source_basis / source_caution / verification_status が含まれる場合は、それを優先して扱います。歴史資料では、一次史料・標準学習整理・研究上の注意点を分け、断定しすぎない説明にします。");
   903:   blocks.push("");
   904:   blocks.push("## 6. 誤解防止");
   905:   blocks.push("制度や事件を単発で完成したものとして扱わず、時系列・後続制度・史料上の注意と接続して説明します。");
   906:   blocks.push("");

   909: 
   910:   return blocks.join("\n");

   869: function aiwB6R95R3Z24BuildMaterialMarkdown(payload, rows) {
   870:   const title = aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload);
   871:   const modelCode = aiwB6R95R3Z24ModelCode(payload);
   872:   const instruction = aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload);
   873: 
   874:   const blocks = [];
   875:   blocks.push("# " + title);
   876:   blocks.push("");
   877:   blocks.push("## 1. 成果物サマリ");
   878:   blocks.push("AIWorkerOSがCX22073JWのruntime materialを参照し、依頼内容に対応する詳細資料として再構成した成果物です。");
   879:   blocks.push("");
   880:   blocks.push("## 2. 生成主体");
   881:   blocks.push("- generation_owner: AIWorkerOS");
   882:   blocks.push("- model_code: " + modelCode);
   883:   blocks.push("- cx_reference_source: CX22073JW runtime material / selector v2 readable brain material");
   884:   blocks.push("- safety_boundary: internal_only_no_external_execution_no_pg_apply_no_destructive_action");
   885:   blocks.push("");
   886:   blocks.push("## 3. 依頼要旨");
   887:   blocks.push(instruction || "依頼文なし");
   888:   blocks.push("");
   889:   blocks.push("## 4. CX参照素材からの展開本文");
   890: 
   891:   rows.slice(0, 16).forEach((row, index) => {
   892:     const title = aiwB6R95R3Z24MaterialTitle(row, index);
   893:     const body = aiwB6R95R3Z24MaterialBody(row).trim();
   894: 
   895:     blocks.push("");
   896:     blocks.push("### 4." + String(index + 1) + " " + title);
   897:     blocks.push(body ? body.slice(0, 2600) : "本文なし");
   898:   });
   899: 
   900:   blocks.push("");
   901:   blocks.push("## 5. 出典・史料注意");
   902:   blocks.push("CX側materialに source_basis / source_caution / verification_status が含まれる場合は、それを優先して扱います。歴史資料では、一次史料・標準学習整理・研究上の注意点を分け、断定しすぎない説明にします。");
   903:   blocks.push("");
   904:   blocks.push("## 6. 誤解防止");
   905:   blocks.push("制度や事件を単発で完成したものとして扱わず、時系列・後続制度・史料上の注意と接続して説明します。");
   906:   blocks.push("");
   907:   blocks.push("## 7. 次工程");
   908:   blocks.push("依頼元アプリは summary_text と deliverable_link を保存し、必要に応じて追加条件を指定して再生成できます。");
   909: 
   910:   return blocks.join("\n");
   911: }

   913: function aiwB6R95R3Z24EnhanceDeliverableWithCxMaterial(deliverable, payload, sourceRouteCode) {
   914:   const safeDeliverable = deliverable || {};
   915:   const originalBody = aiwB6R95R3Z24Text(safeDeliverable.bodyMarkdown || safeDeliverable.body_markdown || "");
   916:   const instruction = aiwB6R95R3Z24Instruction(payload);
   917:   const normalizedBody = originalBody.replace(/\s+/g, "");
   918:   const normalizedInstruction = instruction.replace(/\s+/g, "");
   919:   const echoRisk = normalizedInstruction && normalizedBody.includes(normalizedInstruction.slice(0, Math.min(120, normalizedInstruction.length)));
   920: 
   921:   const rows = aiwB6R95R3Z24FetchCxRuntimeMaterials(payload);
   922: 
   923:   if (!rows.length) {
   924:     safeDeliverable.generationBasis = Object.assign({}, safeDeliverable.generationBasis || {}, {
   925:       cx_material_patch_code: "B6R95R3Z-R24",
   926:       cx_material_rows_found: 0,
   927:       cx_material_body_enhanced: false
   928:     });
   929:     return safeDeliverable;
   930:   }
   931: 
   932:   const enhancedBody = aiwB6R95R3Z24BuildMaterialMarkdown(payload, rows);
   933: 
   934:   if (echoRisk || enhancedBody.length > originalBody.length) {
   935:     safeDeliverable.bodyMarkdown = enhancedBody;
   936:     safeDeliverable.summaryText = "CX22073JWのruntime materialを参照し、" + aiwB6R95R3Z24TaskTitle(payload) + " の詳細資料を生成しました。";
   937:     safeDeliverable.qualityNotes = [
   938:       "CX material rows used: " + String(rows.length),
   939:       "selector/material path: runtime readable brain material v3/v2/v1 fallback",
   940:       "body generation patch: B6R95R3Z-R24",
   941:       "source_route_code: " + String(sourceRouteCode || "")
   942:     ].join("\n");
   943:   }
   944: 
   945:   safeDeliverable.robotContext = Object.assign({}, safeDeliverable.robotContext || {}, {
   946:     cx_material_rows_used: rows.length,
   947:     cx_material_patch_code: "B6R95R3Z-R24"
   948:   });
   949: 
   950:   safeDeliverable.generationBasis = Object.assign({}, safeDeliverable.generationBasis || {}, {
   951:     cx_material_patch_code: "B6R95R3Z-R24",
   952:     cx_material_rows_found: rows.length,
   953:     cx_material_body_enhanced: true,
   954:     source: "CX22073JW runtime readable brain material"
   955:   });
   956: 
   957:   return safeDeliverable;
   958: }
